title: DONATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND DONATION DROP OFF DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of new, unopened, and full-size personal hygiene products such as shampoo, conditioner, and body wash. Also accepts toothpaste and toothbrushes, baby hygiene products, natural household cleaning products, high-efficiency laundry detergent, new pillows, new socks and undergarments (for adults and children), twin sheets and blankets, and kitchenware. Does not accept travel-size toiletries, used clothing or shoes, used toys, furniture, cell phones, or any item not in good, clean, working condition. 6161 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st Thursday of the month 11am-1pm, 3rd Thursday of the month 4pm-6pm Email (503) 243-5159 - . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 243-5159 In-Kind Donations Gina Cadenasso [email protected] Administration (503) 222-6507 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Check in with volunteer at the front door of the church for donation intake. Call or visit website for more information, and items currently accepted and critically needed. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Cleaning Product Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
